headline: TASK-047 is the live v5.0 frontier after 4.0.0.

current_state.operating_goal: Define the first post-v4.0 frontier that preserves the Human Recognition Interface contract while making governed workforce runtime decisions more operationally decisive.
current_state.next_value_slice: Choose the narrowest v5.0 slice that keeps one-screen human recognition truthful while turning governed workforce semantics into stronger live allocation and escalation judgment.

primary_frontier_task.title: Define v5.0 governed runtime priorities after the Human Recognition Interface release

why_now.summary: TASK-047 is the best current frontier because it matches the live post-release goal surface and no stronger truth conflict is active.
reasons: The active release baseline is 4.0.0 and the runtime is now targeting v5.0.
The current operating goal and next value slice both point at a one-screen Human Recognition Interface rather than another abstract visibility artifact.

next_action.recommended_action: Start TASK-047: Define v5.0 governed runtime priorities after the Human Recognition Interface release
next_action.rationale: This is the best open task aligned with the current operating goal and next release frontier.

operator_answers.what_is_happening_now: TASK-047 is the current frontier and the runtime is in implementation-ready.
operator_answers.why_this_state: TASK-047 is the best current frontier because it matches the live post-release goal surface and no stronger truth conflict is active.
operator_answers.what_is_blocked: No critical truth conflict is currently blocking the frontier.
operator_answers.what_should_happen_next: Start TASK-047: Define v5.0 governed runtime priorities after the Human Recognition Interface release
